conventions: Attachment files are named att-<uuid>.md and store metadata in YAML frontmatter

Cross-entity targets are expressed as scheme URIs (board://...)
concerns: No descriptive content or reason for the attachment is provided
The referenced board item is not present in this file, so the attachment is not self-explanatory
